name: Lodzia Rotex Investment Ltd.
summary: Lodzia Rotex Investment Ltd. develops, leases, and manages real estate properties in Israel and internationally. It serves individuals, as well as small and large businesses. The company was formerly known as Lodzia Rotex Textile Company Ltd. and changed its name to Lodzia Rotex Investment Ltd. in 1996. Lodzia Rotex Investment Ltd. was founded in 1924 and is based in Tel Aviv-Yafo, Israel.
